title: Pan-Seared Rubbed Steak
description: A classic steak recipe with a dry rub seasoning that adds flavor to the tender steak. This dish is perfect for a dinner meal.

ingredients.name: Dry Rub (1 tablespoon)
ingredients.notes: Mix of paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper

instructions: Preheat the skillet in the oven to 400°F (200°C).
Season the steak with the dry rub on both sides.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the preheated skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the steak for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the skillet from the oven and reduce the heat to medium.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Return the steak to the skillet and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the steak from the skillet and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Add the butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Serve the steak with the pan sauce spooned over the top.
